title: Usopp Says Goodbye to Kaya
description: On pages 10–13, Syrup Village moves from battle to farewell as Usopp, Kaya, and the Straw Hats decide what comes after Kuro’s defeat.
scene: The danger has passed, but the emotional weight remains: Usopp must choose between staying with the village that knows his lies and chasing the sea like his father.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So you are going to the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have to go before I change my mind

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I won't... I've figured that you might do this

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It really makes me sad though

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Next time I come to this village,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'll tell you adventure stories that are more unbeliev- able than lies

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Well, safe voyage guys! Hope to see you again somewhere!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Sheesh... you're such a cold hearted man... we're both going to be pirates now, so we might meet again on the high seas...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you talking about... hurry up and get on board!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You're already our companion, aren't you...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But if he's with those people...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yeah, I've never seen anyone so strong

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We can't do anything about it... He always wanted to be a pirate

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The Villagers will be sad when we tell them the news

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And it's because Captain... he was pretty noisy just by himself

summary: This part closes Syrup Village by turning Usopp’s lies into a bittersweet farewell, while Kaya’s gift helps the Straw Hats continue their voyage.
